TECHNICAL COMPETENCE

Multidisciplinary Engineering Capabilities

Enconsta combines advanced software suites, field-proven methodologies, and expert verification audits to design high-performance systems for global energy and industrial plants.

01 / PROCESS & MECHANICAL

Process & Mechanical Design

High-fidelity simulation, thermal design, and technical safety audits for heavy process industries.

Process Modeling

Process simulation, P&ID drafting, steady-state hydraulics, and terminal designs.

Mechanical Validation

Static calculations (PV Elite), rotating machinery sizing, and FAT witness support.

02 / INFRASTRUCTURE

Civil & Piping Systems

Detailed structural calculations, dynamic foundation design, and 3D piping routing.

Civil & Structural

Pipe racks, dynamic steel supports, composite layouts, and STAAD-Pro validations.

Piping Engineering

3D modeling (PDMS, E3D), Caesar II stress checks, and isometric extractions.

03 / ELECTRICAL & E&I

Electrical & Instrumentation

Sizing grid lines, designing controls architectures, and telecom setups.

Electrical Grid Sizing

ETAP load analysis, cable sizing, earthing grids, and hazardous classifications.

Instrumentation & F&G

DCS/PLC architectures, SCADA automation loops, and fire & gas telemetry.

04 / DIGITAL INTELLIGENCE

AI & Software Platforms

AI-driven document checking, smart design audits, and reliability modeling.

AI Design Command

Automated P&ID checks, doc generation, and safety criticality analytics.

Engineering Software Stack

Unisim, Olga, Pipenet, PDS, E3D, Caesar II, and PV Elite integrations.

05 / TECHNICAL COMPETENCE

Our Software & Tool Ecosystem

We utilize industry-standard specialized software tools across all engineering disciplines to guarantee precision, safety compliance, and global delivery.
